land_cover.name: NLCD Land Cover
land_cover.phenomenon mapped: Land Cover of the Contiguous USA
land_cover.mosaic projection: Albers Equal Area Conic, on WGS84 spheroid (AEA_WGS84)
land_cover.data coordinate system: Albers Equal Area Conic, on WGS84 spheroid (AEA_WGS84)
land_cover.source: National Land Cover Database, Multi-Resolution Land Characteristics Consortium

land_cover_change.name: NLCD Land Cover Change
land_cover_change.phenomenon mapped: Land cover class changed from and changed to during a given year.
land_cover_change.mosaic projection: Albers Equal Area Conic, on WGS84 spheroid (AEA_WGS84)
land_cover_change.data coordinate system: Albers Equal Area Conic, on WGS84 spheroid (AEA_WGS84)
land_cover_change.source: National Land Cover Database, Multi-Resolution Land Characteristics Consortium

land_cover_confidence.name: NLCD Land Cover Confidence
land_cover_confidence.phenomenon mapped: Percent confidence accompanying each pixel's NLCD land cover class.
land_cover_confidence.mosaic projection: Albers Equal Area Conic, on WGS84 spheroid (AEA_WGS84)
land_cover_confidence.data coordinate system: Albers Equal Area Conic, on WGS84 spheroid (AEA_WGS84)
land_cover_confidence.source: National Land Cover Database, Multi-Resolution Land Characteristics Consortium

impervious_surface.name: NLCD Impervious Surface
impervious_surface.phenomenon mapped: The proportion of the landscape that is impervious to water.
impervious_surface.mosaic projection: North America Albers Equal Area Conic (102008)
impervious_surface.data coordinate system: North America Albers Equal Area Conic (102008)
impervious_surface.time extent: 2001, 2004, 2006, 2008, 2011, 2013, 2016, 2019, and 2021 for the lower 48 conterminous US states. A small portion of Alaska around Anchorage displays a time series of 2001, 2011, and 2016. Hawaii, Puerto Rico, and the US Virgin Islands unfortunately only have data for 2001 so there is only one image in the series. This information may be used in conjunction with the USA NLCD Land Cover layer.

fractional_impervious_surface.name: NLCD Fractional Impervious Surface
fractional_impervious_surface.phenomenon mapped: The percentage of a pixel that is covered by an impervious surface.
fractional_impervious_surface.mosaic projection: Albers Equal Area Conic, on WGS84 spheroid (AEA_WGS84)
fractional_impervious_surface.data coordinate system: Albers Equal Area Conic, on WGS84 spheroid (AEA_WGS84)
fractional_impervious_surface.source: National Land Cover Database, Multi-Resolution Land Characteristics Consortium

impervious_descriptor.name: NLCD Impervious Descriptor
impervious_descriptor.phenomenon mapped: Impervious areas, and very broadly, the reason why the area is impervious.
impervious_descriptor.mosaic projection: Albers Equal Area Conic, on WGS84 spheroid (AEA_WGS84)
impervious_descriptor.data coordinate system: Albers Equal Area Conic, on WGS84 spheroid (AEA_WGS84)
impervious_descriptor.source: National Land Cover Database, Multi-Resolution Land Characteristics Consortium

date_spectral_change.name: NLCD Date of Spectral Change
date_spectral_change.phenomenon mapped: Day a pixel change was detected which changed the pixel from one NLCD class to another.
date_spectral_change.mosaic projection: Albers Equal Area Conic, on WGS84 spheroid (AEA_WGS84)
date_spectral_change.data coordinate system: Albers Equal Area Conic, on WGS84 spheroid (AEA_WGS84)
date_spectral_change.source: National Land Cover Database, Multi-Resolution Land Characteristics Consortium

tree_canopy_cover.name: NLCD Tree Canopy Cover
tree_canopy_cover.phenomenon mapped: Proportion of the landscape covered by trees.
tree_canopy_cover.data coordinate system: North America Albers Equal Area Conic
tree_canopy_cover.units: Percent (of each pixel that is covered by tree canopy)
